file.content:
# TODO

## Grace (@grace@jairosoft.com)

- [ ] **Clean up duplicate User Stories #199352 and #199353 ("Cross Training - Buddy System")**
  - User Story #199352 has no parent and is incorrectly acting as a parent to Feature #197326 ("Reduce Absenteeism - Increase Project Billable Hours"), which inverts the standard Agile hierarchy (Features should be parents of User Stories, not the other way around).
  - User Story #199353 is correctly parented under Feature #197326 but is a duplicate in title and content.
  - **Recommended action:** Remove #199352 or re-classify it as an Epic/Feature, and keep #199353 as the actionable User Story under Feature #197326.
  - **Iteration:** 6.4 (Feb 23 – Mar 8, 2026)
  - **Priority:** 2

- [ ] **Add Description and Acceptance Criteria to the following User Stories in Iteration 6.4**
  - 14 out of 17 User Stories are missing both fields. Each item below needs a proper Description (what needs to be done and why) and Acceptance Criteria (conditions for completion).
  1. #199352 — Cross Training - Buddy System
  2. #199353 — Cross Training - Buddy System
  3. #199524 — Proposal Presentation
  4. #199525 — Bomar Service Agreement
  5. #199522 — Renewal of PhilGeps
  6. #198759 — Bomar Visa Application Requirements
  7. #198760 — Jove Visa Application Requirement
  8. #198762 — Bon Visa Application Requirement
  9. #199575 — Draft JESI Contract
  10. #199576 — Draft Chippens Contract
  11. #199577 — Gather Adam Requirements
  12. #199578 — Draft Travel Policy
  13. #199579 — Ryan Service Agreement
  14. #199580 — Earl Service Agreement
  - **Iteration:** 6.4 (Feb 23 – Mar 8, 2026)
  - **Priority:** High — these fields are essential for sprint execution clarity

- [ ] **Configure Team Capacity for Iteration 6.4**
  - Team capacity is not set for the current iteration (6.4: Feb 23 – Mar 8, 2026) or the OTP Team.
  - Without capacity configured, there is no burndown chart, velocity tracking, or workload visibility.
  - **Action:** Go to OTP > Sprints > Iteration 6.4 > Capacity tab and set daily capacity hours and any days off for each team member.
  - **Iteration:** 6.4 (Feb 23 – Mar 8, 2026)
  - **Priority:** High — should be done at the start of each sprint

  3. Measurable: Aiming for a 15% reduction in lost hours/revenue leakage.

  4. Achievable: Focuses on policy and planning rather than impossible 100% attendance.

  5. Relevant: Directly links attendance to the ability to invoice the client.

  6. Time-bound: To be achieved by the end of the 2026 fiscal year.
